Each “exchange list” includes a number of measured foods of similar nutritive value that can be substituted inter-changeably in meal plans. Free radicals : Highly reactive oxygen-derived species formed in the body during normal metabolic processes. They have the capacity to damage cellular components by oxidation. Haemorrhoids : Commonly known as piles. 125 High-density lipoproteins (HDL) : These transport cholesterol from the extra-hepatic tissues to the liver. They are anti-atherogenic.
